idea-plugin.name: MilkJ
idea-plugin.description:
A WYSIWYG Markdown editor for JetBrains IDEs, powered by Milkdown. Ideal for agentic AI md PLAN editing workflows.

MilkJ adds a rich "what you see is what you get" editing surface for Markdown files, rendered with Milkdown inside an embedded JCEF browser. It appears as an editor tab right next to IntelliJ's built-in Markdown editor — write in WYSIWYG, then switch back to the native source/preview editor whenever you like.

Built-in Harper spell checking highlights mistakes as you write and includes an application-wide, persistent custom dictionary. Add project names and specialist terms directly from the correction popup, or manage the complete dictionary in MilkJ settings.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
0.1.8
  • Added Harper spell checking for rendered Markdown.
  • Added a persistent custom dictionary, with quick-add actions in the correction popup and full management in MilkJ settings.
  • Dictionary changes automatically update every open MilkJ editor.

0.1.7
  • No more spurious "File Cache Conflict" dialogs: MilkJ no longer writes into the document unless you actually edited in the MilkJ tab.
  • External edits update the editor in place instead of rebuilding it (cursor and scroll are kept).
  • Edits sync as minimal text ranges — finer undo steps and no caret jumps in the native tab.
  • Read-only files are now read-only in MilkJ too, and a notification appears if a conflicting external change discards an unsynced edit.
  • Works even when the bundled Markdown plugin is disabled.
  • New "Shortcuts" reference tab next to the MilkJ editor (can be hidden in Settings | Tools | MilkJ).
  • Mermaid diagrams render through the code-block preview panel.
  • Compatible with 2026.2 EAP, where JCEF moved into the separate "Web Browser (JCEF)" plugin.
